required_flair.label: Required Post Flair
required_flair.helpText: The bot only triggers on posts with this exact flair.

reassurance_message.label: Reassurance Message
reassurance_message.helpText: The support message at the bottom of the comment.
reassurance_message.defaultValue: Delays, altitude changes, and routing adjustments are completely normal. You are safe, and you are not alone.

future_warning_text.label: Future Flight Disclaimer
future_warning_text.helpText: Warning shown if future keywords are detected.
future_warning_text.defaultValue: Note: Since your flight appears to be in the future, these links may show today's flights until your actual departure time.

future_keywords.label: Future Flight Keywords
future_keywords.helpText: Keywords that trigger the future disclaimer.

sticky_comment.label: Sticky Bot Comment
sticky_comment.helpText: When enabled, the bot will automatically sticky its comment to the top of the post.
